notes: Loads the Linux i2c-dev interface needed for Argon ONE fan control.
Persists i2c-dev through /etc/modules-load.d so the fan remains controllable after reboot.
Applies the I2C device-node fix through both fresh images and built-in updater installs.
Keeps the Argon fan helper compatible with register-based and legacy Argon fan controllers.
Waits for newly paired Gamepad controllers to expose a Linux input device and only reconnects when XInput, Android, or Switch modes report connected too early.
Adds Home to the controller mapper so the back-to-CRT-Station button can be corrected on controllers with unusual button layouts.
